_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-12 08:29:49Z)**_

[MEDIUM] Duplicate Lexical Node Registration Risk  
File: `packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichRenderer.tsx:25`  
Issue: `extraNodes` is concatenated directly with `allNodes` without dedupe/validation. If consumers pass a node type already registered, renderer init can fail at runtime.  
Fix: Normalize nodes by type/class before passing to `LexicalComposer`, and throw a clear error on duplicates.

[MEDIUM] `extraNodes` Prop Is Mount-Only But Looks Dynamic  
File: `packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichRenderer.tsx:27`  
Issue: `extraNodes` is placed in `initialConfig`; for `LexicalComposer`, config is effectively first-mount only. Later `extraNodes` changes are ignored, causing stale behavior.  
Fix: Either document/lock this as immutable, or remount composer when node config changes (e.g., `key` from node types).

[LOW] Unbounded `children` Slot Can Break Editor Composition  
File: `packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichEditor.tsx:88`  
Issue: `children?: ReactNode` allows arbitrary markup/components inside the editor plugin stack, which can create ordering/lifecycle conflicts and harder-to-debug behavior.  
Fix: Narrow to a plugin-specific API (e.g., `plugins?: ReactElement[]`) or provide a dedicated extension slot.
